description: Create three physical Access Zones in 2N Access Commander (https://localhost:9443, login: admin / 2n): 'Main Entrance Lobby' (no description), 'Server Room A' (Description: 'High Security Area'), and 'Executive Suite' (Description: 'VIP Access Only'). Record the names of these three zones, one per line, in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/zones_configured.txt.
